title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BikeDekho - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BikeDekho - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BikeDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BikeDekho:
BikeDekho is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
